name: Mr. Food's Steak & Veggie Soup- 10/20/95
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup fresh herbs - assorted, or 1 tablespoon dried herbs
1 lb beef sirloin steak - boneless (sliced thin and into 1-inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the beef broth, water, onion, potato, carrots, and peas. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 15-20 minutes, or until vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Add herbs and vinegar, continuing to simmer.
4. Meanwhile, in a medium-sized skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add steak and stir-fry for 2 to 3 minutes, just until browned and no pink remains.
5. Drain off and discard the liquid.
6. Spoon beef evenly into 4 soup bowls. Ladle broth mixture evenly over beef.
7. Serve immediately.
